name: courseforge-mcp
description: Build real Canvas LMS courses with AI — modules, pages, assignments, quizzes, or a whole .imscc course package imported in one call.
long_description: CourseForge turns a syllabus or course idea into a real Canvas course. Draft a CourseSpec with your AI assistant, validate it, then build_course_from_spec imports everything (modules, pages, assignments, quizzes with questions, discussions, files) into Canvas in one atomic content-migration — arriving unpublished for your review. Also exports courses as .imscc for remixing and runs a pre-publish readiness check.

canvas_base_url.title: Canvas URL
canvas_base_url.description: Your institution's Canvas address, e.g. https://youruni.instructure.com

canvas_api_token.title: Canvas API token
canvas_api_token.description: Create one in Canvas: Account → Settings → + New access token
